project: SNN sEMG Muscle-Fatigue Detection - HPEC handoff
goal: IEEE HPEC submission: energy-efficient neuromorphic sEMG fatigue inference on verified FPGA RTL
verified: All RTL bit-exact vs Python Q6.10 reference (per-layer + full chain). Resource/latency measured, not estimated.

files.desc: Excludes build artifacts, the 3GB downloaded dataset, and caches from version control.
